title: Bank of Baroda Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 5000 Posts
department: Human Resource Management (HRM), Bank of Baroda
short_info: Bank of Baroda Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Get the latest BOB recruitment notification 2026 for 5000 Apprentice vacancies under the Apprentices Act, 1961. The online application process starts on 19th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 8th June 2026. Find Bank of Baroda Apprentice vacancies across all States/UTs on the official website http://bankofbaroda.bank.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming Bank of Baroda Apprentice Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for BOB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 apply

important_dates.online examination date: To be notified on Bank's website and https://bfsissc.com
important_dates.document verification / language profici: To be notified after Online Examination result

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay non-refundable Application/Intimation/Examination Charges/Fees to BFSI SSC through the secure payment link provided in the application form. The fee must be paid through ONLINE mode only. No other mode of payment will be accepted. Fee once paid will NOT be refunded on any account.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be a minimum of 20 years and maximum of 28 years of age as on the cut-off date (01-05-2026). Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India guidelines for reserved categories, subject to the condition that NAPS-registered candidates should be below 34 years as on 01-05-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation Degree in any Discipline from a recognized University or any equivalent qualifications recognized by the Central Government. For NATS candidates: date of passing Graduation should not be more than 4 years preceding 01-05-2026.
qualification.experience: Candidates who had training or job experience for a period of 1 year or more after completing educational qualification shall NOT be eligible.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date (01-05-2026). Candidates must be registered on Government Apprenticeship Portals (NATS and/or NAPS) before applying. Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply.

vacancy_details.State/UT: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates must first mandatorily register themselves on the Government Apprenticeship portals - NATS (https://nats.education.gov.in) and/or NAPS (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in).

After completing registration on NAPS/NATS, eligible candidates will receive an email from [email protected] inviting them to fill the final "Application cum Examination Form" and make payment of the applicable fee/charges.

The application registration is considered complete only when fee/charges are deposited with BFSI SSC. Candidates must note down their Enrolment Id (NATS portal) and Apprentice Registration Code (NAPS portal) for all future correspondence.
Documents Required for Registration on NATS/NAPS Portals:
important_instructions: This is NOT regular employment or contract employment in the Bank. Apprentices will be TRAINEES only and not employees of Bank of Baroda. The apprentice shall have no right to claim employment in the Bank after completion of training. Bank of Baroda has no obligation to offer regular employment to apprentices during or after the apprenticeship period. Candidates can apply for engagement as apprentice in one State/UT only. Allotment to a different State/UT will not be considered under any circumstances. Candidates must first register on NATS and/or NAPS portals before applying; application without portal registration is not valid. The process of registration is complete only when applicable fee/charges are deposited with BFSI SSC. No Ex-servicemen / Disabled Ex-Servicemen shall be engaged as an apprentice; there is no reservation for Ex-servicemen in this engagement. OBC candidates belonging to the 'Creamy Layer' are not entitled to OBC reservation and age relaxation; they should apply as General / General (OC/HI/VI/ID) as applicable. Change of category once submitted in the online application will not be permitted at any stage. Candidates should submit only one application; in case of multiple submissions, only the last valid completed application will be considered and fee paid for earlier registrations will be forfeited. The Apprentices are prohibited from joining / forming any Union Body. All correspondence will be made only on the registered email ID; candidates should keep it active throughout the recruitment process. No hard copy intimation will be sent by post for Online Examination. Candidates must appear for the selection process (Document Verification, Language Test) at their own cost; Bank will not reimburse travelling expenses. Apprentices will not be provided with Transport / Hostel facility or any other residential accommodation during training. Stipend of Rs. 15,000/- per month will be paid on completion of each month after adjusting Loss of Pay, if any. No other allowances/benefits are payable. All amendments/corrigendum (if any) will be published only on the Bank's website (https://bankofbaroda.bank.in/) and https://bfsissc.com - candidates should visit regularly. Any canvassing directly or indirectly shall disqualify the candidature. Use of unfair means, impersonation, or misbehavior will lead to disqualification and/or debarment. Legal jurisdiction for any dispute arising out of this recruitment shall be Mumbai only.
